description: Wave 1 - M05 Activity Engine: Implement fixed safety rule evaluator combining occupancy and equipment state. Branch: feat/m05-activity-engine. This is R3 safety-critical.
steps: Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/safety/decision.go with SafetyDecision types: SAFE, WARNING, STOP_REQUEST_REQUIRED, RESTART_INTERLOCK, SAFETY_CONFIRMATION_UNAVAILABLE, MAINTENANCE_MONITORING
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/safety/rules.go implementing fixed safety rules R-01 through R-05 from PRODUCT_MVP_SPEC
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/safety/evaluator.go with Evaluator that takes zone occupancy + equipment state and produces SafetyDecision

Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/safety/evaluator_test.go with truth table tests: R-01 (OCCUPIED+RUNNING=STOP_REQUEST), R-02 (RESTART_REQUESTED+not_VACANT_CONFIRMED=INTERLOCK), R-03 (UNKNOWN/STALE=UNAVAILABLE), R-04 (WORK_WINDOW+STOPPED=MAINTENANCE), R-05 (duplicate suppression)
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/safety/workwindow.go for maintenance work window state management
Ensure UNKNOWN and STALE states always block restart (never satisfy vacancy)
Ensure no automatic restart from AI vacancy alone
Ensure rules are deterministic - same input always produces same output
Document R3 classification in code comments
Run make build and make test
acceptance_criteria: All 5 safety rules (R-01 to R-05) are implemented and tested
Truth table tests cover every combination of zone state + equipment state
UNKNOWN and STALE always result in RESTART_INTERLOCK when restart is requested
No automatic restart permitted from AI vacancy alone
Duplicate event suppression prevents duplicate output commands (R-05)
